title: hack: Display IP address of VM from script
body:
Useful for accessing it from other terminals.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: Note to me: This will clash with 2561, will need to rebase and test manually.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2561) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
